mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_ai_files (name, original_name, file_type, mime_type, size, storage_path, status, uploaded_by, knowledge_base_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{original_name}, #{file_type}, #{mime_type}, #{size}, #{storage_path}, 'active', #{uploaded_by}, #{knowledge_base_id})
mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM sys_ai_files WHERE knowledge_base_id = #{knowledge_base_id} AND status != 'deleted'
AND original_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{original_name}, '%')
